title: Main difference between Works Management and Monday Project
excerpt:
Hello community 
Could anyone please address me to the right place where I can find information about the differences (main) between Workspace and Monday Project? Perhaps a comparison table? 
Thanks!

posts.author: anamariaelsal (Ana Maria de Espinoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community
Could anyone please address me to the right place where I can find information about the differences (main) between Workspace and Monday Project? Perhaps a comparison table?
Thanks!

posts.author: MichaelAtIRIS (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ana Maria, I really hope someone from Monday or an expert will weigh in because it needs to be clarified. I’m running Work OS under Enterprise, and I have a trial version of Monday Project using a different account. I cannot see any difference other than a template that appears to be unique to Monday Project (Multi-project), but there’s nothing in that template that you can’t build in Work OS.

I opened a trial for Monday Project because I wanted to see if dependency relationships could be customized (FS, SF, SS, FF), but so far, I doesn’t seem to be possible. I hope this helps.

posts.author: anamariaelsal (Ana Maria de Espinoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Michael. In fact, we arrived at similar conclusion after several tests. Not sure if this differentiation is related to pricing plans or so.

Many thanks and have a good day ahead!

posts.author: MichaelAtIRIS (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah, ok. Thanks for confirming, saved me from additional testing.

posts.author: karel (Karel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I also came to the same conclusion that there is almost zero difference between the 2 products. I don’t see a single reason why anyone would add “Monday Projects” as a product. Can anyone enlighten us?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday Projects has been deprecated. All functionality that was to be tied solely to Projects has been added to Work Management (Critical Path, Baselines, etc).

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: anamariaelsal (Ana Maria de Espinoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Many thanks for the update, Mark! So, how we can disable the project option from our platform? Any clue? or no need it.

Best,

Ana María
